input.title: Grupo Galicia ADR jumps after Argentina policy headline
input.content: Shares of Grupo Financiero Galicia (GGAL) ADRs rose after local reports of a market-friendly policy signal in Argentina. Liquidity in the CEDEAR/ADR complex increased intraday. Analysts urged caution until an official decree is published.

mockModelResponse.headline: GGAL ADRs rally on Argentina policy chatter
mockModelResponse.summary: GGAL ADRs advanced on reports of a market-friendly Argentine policy signal, though confirmation is still pending.

meta.notes: LatAm ADR/CEDEAR-style name; policy chatter, not regulation filing.
